title: Senior Business Consultant - T24
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Business Transformation: Partner with Tier-1 banking clients to capture complex business requirements and translate them into actionable T24 configurations.

  • Documentation Excellence: Lead the creation of high-quality Business Requirement Documents (BRD) and Functional Specification Documents (FSD) for custom developments.

  • Gap Analysis: Conduct deep-dive analysis between "Out-of-the-Box" T24 capabilities and client-specific needs, proposing sustainable workarounds that align with project scope.

  • System Configuration: Define and validate customization needs; manage static and semi-static data definitions to ensure a seamless core banking implementation.

  • Quality Assurance: Oversee functional testing and provide expert support during User Acceptance Testing (UAT) to ensure solution integrity.

  • Process Optimization: Analyze existing client workflows and recommend global best practices to maximize the ROI of the Temenos suite.

  • Stakeholder Management: Act as the single point of contact for end-to-end functional solutions, managing communication across technical teams and business units.

Technical & Professional Requirements

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree in Finance, IT, or a related field.

  • Experience: Minimum 10 years of hands-on experience in Temenos Solutions Consultancy or Expert Services.

  • Domain Expertise: Proven track record in T24 Core Banking transformations or Temenos Wealth Suite projects.

  • Module Specialization: Advanced knowledge in:

    • Arrangement Architecture (AA): Loans and Deposits.

    • Wealth & Treasury: Securities, Corporate Actions, MM, FX, and Swaps.

    • Payments: Hands-on experience with TPH (Temenos Payments Hub) is highly preferred.

  • Standard Frameworks: Deep understanding of SWIFT messaging (MT/MX), Trade Settlements, and Order Management Systems.

  • Methodology: Expert-level ability to apply the Temenos Implementation Methodology (TIM).

postedCompany.description:
Blazecorp is a consulting and workforce solutions provider based in Singapore, offering a wide range of services aimed at helping businesses modernize and optimize their operations. They specialize in digital transformation, engineering, and workforce solutions, including recruitment services for permanent, contract, and executive roles. Blazecorp also provides consulting in technology strategy, workforce transformation, and cloud computing, helping businesses leverage innovative solutions to drive growth and efficiency.

Their headquarters is located at 160 Robinson Road, Singapore, and they have a strong focus on Southeast Asia, working with clients from various industries to provide tailor-made solutions​
postedCompany.name: BLAZECORP PTE. LTD.
